summary.context: Express.js handler fetching orders with nested queries for items, products, and shipping per order.

findings.title: N+1 query pattern with multiplicative database calls
findings.issue: For N orders with M items each, executes 1 + N + (N*M) + N queries
findings.suggestion: Use a single JOIN query to fetch all data at once

findings.title: Missing error handling for async database operations
findings.issue: No try-catch wraps async database calls
findings.suggestion: Wrap in try-catch with proper error response and logging

findings.title: Missing input validation on userId parameter
findings.issue: userId passed to query without validation
findings.suggestion: Parse and validate userId as positive integer

findings.title: Using SELECT * instead of explicit column names
findings.issue: SELECT * is fragile to schema changes
